rental.trigger: Applicant pays rent after the agreed due date
rental.consequence: Late-payment amount stated in the clause
rental.fairness: Check whether the amount is capped and proportionate.

rental.trigger: Applicant breaches the stated deposit condition
rental.consequence: Deposit forfeiture stated in the clause
rental.fairness: Automatic or total forfeiture may be disproportionate to actual loss.

rental.trigger: Recipient does not return the refundable deposit as agreed
rental.consequence: Only compensation expressly stated in the clause
rental.fairness: No compensation amount should be inferred if the document does not state one.

loan.consequence: Penalty or default interest stated in the clause
loan.fairness: Check disclosure, calculation method, cap, and proportionality.

employment.trigger: Applicant does not serve the stated notice period
employment.consequence: Notice-pay recovery stated in the clause
employment.fairness: Check whether the obligation is mutual and legally applicable.

employment.trigger: Recipient terminates employment under the stated condition
employment.fairness: Check eligibility and calculation against applicable employment law.

service.trigger: Recipient delays or fails the stated service level
service.consequence: Service credit or damages stated in the clause
service.fairness: Check the cap and whether the remedy excludes non-waivable rights.
